item.title: How to wholesale party supplies from China
item.dc:creator: Zero Chan
item.description:
wholesale party supplies from China are the best way for you to begin your party supplies wholesale business. China has the world’s largest wholesale market for party supplies, where you can find all kinds of categories of party products. You may not know that most of the world’s party supplies are from Chinese manufacturers, like […]

The post How to wholesale party supplies from China appeared first on Toys wholesalers.
item.content:encoded:
wholesale party supplies from China are the best way for you to begin your party supplies wholesale business. China has the world’s largest wholesale market for party supplies, where you can find all kinds of categories of party products.

You may not know that most of the world’s party supplies are from Chinese manufacturers, like Party City, Qualatex Balloon, and other companies’ products, most of which are produced and sold in China.

Before you can source party supplies from China, there are 6 steps you need to know in order to source party products from China.

6 Steps to wholesale party supplies from China

#1. Find the right wholesale party supplies supplier.

#2. Select party supplies made in China and place orders.

#3. Confirm the order with a Chinese manufacturer and arrange the production.

#4. Arrange for container loading and customs declaration in China.

#5. Find a shipping company agent to assist you in completing customs declarations and shipping to your port.

#6. When the container arrives at your port, the shipping company agent will do the customs clearance and ship the goods to your warehouse.

The biggest party supplies wholesale market in China

When we start importing party supplies from China, we need to know where we would be better off importing party supplies from. The biggest party supplies wholesale market is located in Yiwu wholesale market.

Here you can purchase a variety of party supplies, and holiday supplies, such as Christmas supplies, Halloween supplies, birthday party decorations, latex balloons， foil balloons, and other various party products.

The wholesale market of party supplies is located on the first floor of Yiwu International Trade City, District 1. mainly concentrated in Area C.

Of course, if you want to purchase Christmas supplies, you need to look for suppliers on the third floor of Yiwu International Trade City, District 1, Area A. The wholesalers of Christmas supplies are mainly concentrated here.

Made in China party supplies list

In addition to knowing where to find party product suppliers, we also need to know which party supplies are made in China. This way we can do a better job of planning our purchases.

Here I will show you the list of made-in-China party supplies. And also you can check the details of our party supplies catalog.

Party Supplies Catagories party supplies details
Theme Party supply
Birthday Party; Gender Reveal/Baby Shower; Bachelorette/wedding; Graduation theme party.
Festiva Party Supplies /Decoration
Easter Holiday Supplies; New Year Holiday Supplies; Valentine's Day Holiday Supplies; Eid Mubarak Holiday Supplies.
Christmas party supplies/decoration
Christmas Tree; Christmas Ball; Christmas tableware; Christmas tree accessories; Christmas stocking; Christmas wreath; Christmas dress; Christmas gift box; Christmas Headband; Christmas Ribbon; Christmas hang flags; Christmas foil Balloon;
Party Balloon Decoration
INS Style Balloon Set; Number&Letter Balloon; Party Balloon Set; Party Decoration Series; Solid Color Shape Balloon; 18 Inch Round/Star/Heart Series; 4D Balloon; Headwear Balloon; Latex Balloon; BOBO Balloon;
Party Item Supplies
Foil Curtain; Paper Plate; Paper Cup; Gift Boxes & Bag; candy box; Confetti; Straw; Napkin; Invitation Card; Candle; Party glasses; Party mask; Party headband; Party hat;
LED Party Supplies
LED Flashing Stick; LED party glasses; led noise maker; LED Foam Sticks; LED bracelet; LED necklace; LED headwear; LED Candle; LED Mask; LED ring; LED hat; LED cup; LED Flower; LED Fan; LED accessories;
Party Glow Stick
Glow Stick; Glow Mask; Glow Bracelet; Glow Headband; Glow Necklace; Glow Toy; Glow Badge; Glow Eyeglasses; Glow Earring; Glow Ring;
Baking
Cupcake Wrappers; Cupcake Toppers; Cake Stands;

According to this list, you can find out which party supplies are made in China. Then you can look at those products you are more interested in. You can start your purchasing plan now.

Best 8 China wholesale websites to wholesale party supply online.

In addition to finding Chinese party supplies wholesalers offline, we can also find Chinese supplies wholesalers online, which allows you to contact Chinese manufacturers directly from home.

Next, I will introduce 8 of the best wholesale websites in China to help you find China party supplies wholesalers online.

#1. Party Dream–ballonchina.com

#2. Alibaba–alibaba.com

#3. DHgate–dhgate.com

#4. Global Sources–globalsources.com

#5. Made In China–made-in-china.com

#6. HKTDC–hktdc.com

#7. Yiwugo–yiwugo.com

#8. AliExpress–best.aliexpress.com

#1. Party Dream

Party Dream is a Chinese party supplies wholesaler located in Yiwu, the first party supplies wholesaler in Yiwu. They have over 10 years of experience in party supplies wholesaling and can provide one-stop party supplies sourcing service.

Compared to ordinary suppliers, they don’t just wholesale party products to you, they can also assist you with the sourcing process and help you with all the work of importing party supplies from China, including arranging containers and shipping to your port.

#2. Alibaba

As we all know, Alibaba is the largest online wholesale website in the world and the largest wholesale website in China. You can find any product you want to purchase on it, including party supplies of course.

How to wholesale party supplies online through Alibaba? It’s easy, you just need to look for the corresponding party supplies name in the search box on the home page, and you will find many party supplies as well as suppliers.

Here is a recommended wholesale party supplier for you from Alibaba. They are wholesalers as well as aluminum film balloon manufacturers. Maybe they can give you some help.

#3. DHgate

If you are just starting your wholesale party supplies business, DHgate is the best choice besides recommending you Party Dream. A fast and easy wholesale buying experience is their goal.

DHgate is good for small orders, so if you want to buy some samples first, or buy wholesale party supplies in small quantities first, then he is your best choice. And the more you buy, the more you save.

#4. Global Sources

Global Sources is a well-known Chinese wholesale website that is a one-stop platform for all your sourcing needs. Like DHgate and Alibaba, it serves as an online wholesale marketplace that connects sellers with sellers and provides transaction security.

It is also a trade show facilitator, where you can clearly check and learn about all the trade shows in China. However, here, you can not buy directly, you need to send a request for quotation like a supplier, then communicate and negotiate with the party supplies suppliers on price, delivery, payment, etc., and finally confirm the order.

#5. Made In China

Made-in-China is one of the oldest Chinese wholesale websites, and I believe many of you know it as an online wholesale website where you can find the right party supplies directly and confirm your order directly with the supplier.

Is Made-in-China safe? Please be assured that it has a payment mechanism and they will pay the seller only when the buyer confirms the receipt in the backend. So once you have any problems, you can appeal like the platform, which greatly guarantees your interests.

#6. HKTDC

HKTDC (Hong Kong Trade Development Council) is Hong Kong’s online wholesale marketplace with over 130,000 Chinese manufacturers. If you have ever been to a trade show in Hong Kong, you must have heard of it. He is the initiator of the Hong Kong trade show.

Here you can find direct manufacturers of party supplies. Because the manufacturers here are all Chinese suppliers who have participated in the Hong Kong exhibition, they are very professional and if you want to purchase party supplies in large quantities, it is your best choice.

#7. Yiwugo

Yiwugo is an online wholesale website for Yiwu wholesale market. If you want to purchase party supplies directly from Yiwu wholesale market online, then yiwugo is the best choice for you.

Each storefront here corresponds to an offline Yiwu market wholesale storefront, and you can contact suppliers directly by phone, mobile number, email, or online.

However, since most suppliers do not speak English, the best way is to use a Chinese sourcing agent to help you get a quote and complete your purchase after you find the right supplier.

#8. AliExpress

AliExpress is the largest B2C website under Alibaba, and also a B2B wholesale website. Similar to DHgate, if you want to purchase party products in small quantities or purchase samples of party products first, then this is a site you can consider and learn about.

You can order directly from the platform, and if you buy more, you can also get a better price. Of course, then you need to buy a small number of wholesale party supplies, you better contact the store directly to get the best price.

How to order party supplies with China manufacturer

Once you have found the right Chinese manufacturer and picked out the products you want to purchase, you should start arranging to place your order.

Usually, the Chinese supplier will prepare a proforma invoice for you, and after you confirm all the terms, you just need to pay for the goods and they will arrange the production for you.

Of course, if you are wholesaling party supplies online, then generally you are trading directly through a platform such as Alibaba. When you pay for the goods, you are actually paying Alibaba to know that you have received the goods and confirmed receipt before Alibaba will credit the supplier, making your purchase more secure.

However, there are still two tips you need to be aware of here.

TIPS 1: About payment.

If the transaction is done offline, you need to confirm the payment method with the Chinese supplier and deal with him through a method that best suits your needs. 

Common payment methods are:

#1. Full payment before order;

#2. 30% down payment, the balance before shipment;

#3. 30% deposit, 70% balance against BL copy.

You can choose the payment method that best suits your needs based on the amount of the order, and by negotiating with the supplier. Generally speaking, the third one, 30% deposit, 70% balance against BL copy is the most favorable payment method for the buyer.

TIPS 2: About Quality Control

Generally speaking, when we place an order, our biggest concern is the quality of the product, whether it can meet or even exceed our expectations. If you are looking for a party supplies wholesale supplier like Party Dream, they will show you the quality of the product by taking pictures and videos to show you whether it meets your requirements after the production is over, one by one.

If you are working directly with a wholesale supplier or manufacturer, it is best to first understand the quality of the product through pictures or videos. When the goods are produced, you can ask them to take pictures or videos for you to check the product quality.

At the same time, you can also find a Chinese sourcing agent to help you to do product quality inspection, they will issue a report to you, the general cost is 150 U.S. dollars a day.

How to ship party supplies from China

When you have finished producing all your products, all that remains is to transport the goods to your warehouse. You can choose between sea, air or land transport depending on the goods you order.

Of course, you can also choose whether to have it delivered directly to your warehouse or to have the customs clearance company clear it for you upon arrival at the port and get a trailer to transport it to your warehouse.

For starters, you can ask your supplier to ship directly to your warehouse for you, so you don’t have to waste time contacting freight companies and customs clearance companies to pick up your goods from the port.

Conclusion

Import party supplies from China, learn how to find party supplies suppliers online or offline, then learn about the list of party supplies made in China. When the order is confirmed, confirm the payment method and quality inspection, and finally ship to your warehouse. This is actually very simple, if you don’t understand anything feel free to leave a comment and tell us.

The post How to wholesale party supplies from China appeared first on Toys wholesalers.

item.title: Top 8 Wholesale Toys Distributors List You Should Know Before You Wholesale Toys.￼
item.dc:creator: Zero Chan
item.description:
Most buyers would like to get a list of wholesale toys distributors. This list should ideally have a description of the toy suppliers so that they can pick the right one for them.  I am a veteran buyer with many years of experience in toy buying and I can know which toy suppliers are the […]

The post Top 8 Wholesale Toys Distributors List You Should Know Before You Wholesale Toys.￼ appeared first on Toys wholesalers.
item.content:encoded:
Most buyers would like to get a list of wholesale toys distributors. This list should ideally have a description of the toy suppliers so that they can pick the right one for them. 

I am a veteran buyer with many years of experience in toy buying and I can know which toy suppliers are the best.

I hope to be able to help more people and I have compiled a list of the top 10 wholesale toys distributors. I hope it can help more toy buyers to find the right toys suppliers.

1. Poxst Service

Poxst Service is a very professional wholesale toys distributors, they provide a one-stop shopping service for toys. This is a China toy company, and since they are in Chenghai District, Shantou toys, Guangdong – the world’s toy factory – they can help you source toys directly from the factory.

Their feature is that a box is also a factory price. Because of their excellent geographical advantage, they can directly connect to each factory and help you source toys at the lowest factory price. I think that you who is an importer, will not refuse such a toy company.

I was pleasantly surprised by their one-stop shop for toys. Even if I don’t know anything about toy sourcing or importing, they can handle all the toy sourcing for me. The quotation they provide is very competitive. 

When I confirm the order, Poxst Service will help me to arrange the order production, follow up on the product production progress and inform me on time. 

When the products are finished, they will do a quality inspection on each product and let me know the result. Finally, they will arrange the container to transport the toys to my port. This is simply too easy for me.

If you are considering importing toys from China, I think Poxst Service is something you shouldn’t miss.

2. SHEPHER

SHEPHER Distributors is one of the largest wholesale and clearance toy distributors located in the northeast of the United States and has been in business for 75 years. I’m sure most of you are aware of this company. 

They sell a wide variety of products, including toys, games, dolls, sporting goods, novelty toys, and more. Most of the toys are brand toys, like Disney, Mattel, Fisher-Price, etc.

 

Low starting quantity, sufficient stock, and affordable price are their characteristics. If you are an Amazon seller and want to sell branded toys on Amazon, then congratulations, they are perfect for you.

 

They can help you ship your toys directly to the Amazon FBA warehouse. This one saves you a lot of things. You just need to focus on selling your products.

3. LICENSE-2-PLAY

License 2 Play is a one-stop solution for wholesale toys, gifts, novelty items, candy, and more. They have been in business since 2004 and specialize in wholesale toys and gifts.

They offer various types of wholesale toys such as Action figures, Boys’ toys, Candy Toys, Dolls, and so on. They also have their own brands, such as BOSTON AMERICA CORP, LICENSE 2 PLAY TOYS LLC, SUPER IMPULSE, and so on.

If you are in the United States, you must have heard of this company. They have enough toy categories to satisfy your need for toy sales. If you want to wholesale toys locally in the US, I think License 2 Play is a good choice for you.

4. BBCW Distributors

BBCW Distributors is a true wholesale distribution and related services company in the collectible toy and figure industry. They are also a full-service provider of logistics. 

They offer distribution services, including gift boxes, gift wrapping, and personalized message cards.

If you are an Amazon seller, they can also provide offer warehousing services including order consolidation and direct to FBA shipping so you can focus on selling.

BBCW Distributors has the advantage of offering quality products at competitive prices, and they can ship orders within 2-3 business days of receipt.

Their main warehouse and office are in South Florida, with additional shipping points across the country to better serve our customers.

5. Four Seasons General Merchandise

Four Seasons General Merchandise is a leader in import, wholesale, distribution, and export within the general merchandise industry, online and offline.

Their showroom and warehouse are in the heart of the downtown Los Angeles wholesale district, with approximately 25,000 square feet of showroom space displaying 10,000 items in 50 categories and subcategories. 

Five miles away, their 680,000 square foot warehouse ships hundreds of orders per day, from boxes to pallets and entire containers.

Their customers include, for example, dollar stores, discount stores, convenience stores, grocery stores, gift stores, toy stores, supermarkets, importers/wholesalers, Amazon sellers, non-profit organizations, chain stores, and department stores.

Unlike Poxst Service, they mainly target customers in the US market. Although most of their toys are from China, if you want to source China toys and don’t want to spend too much time on the matter of importing from China, this company is a good fit for you.

6. Kole Imports

Kole Imports is one of the largest direct importers of general merchandise in the United States, selling wholesale merchandise and bargains on a wide variety of items, especially toys. 

All their toys are imported from Shantou, China, and sold to major wholesalers and retailers in the United States.

Our 250,000-square-foot warehouse in Los Angeles contains millions of items. At any given time, they have tens of thousands of unique saleable items in stock, serving many different industries. 

Also, they have 10,000 square feet of showrooms in Los Angeles displaying all types of products.

Since they buy all their toys in bulk from Chinese toy manufacturers, their prices are low. Of course, he is a great choice for those of you who want to buy wholesale toys. 

This means that you can see the toys in their showroom, and you can always get the toys in stock and sell them directly.

7. United Pacific Designs

United Pacific Designs supplies licensed toys directly to retailers. If you need innovative, well-designed, and affordable branded licensed merchandise, then U.P.D. is your best bet. 

Their products include the best value in stationery, toys, backpacks, keychains, children’s tableware and beverages, photo albums, stickers, and children’s novelty items.

They have a professional team of designers and buyers who are constantly developing new products to provide you with a variety of licensed character toys at great value.

They also have a showroom, in Vernon, CA. You can find thousands of licensed character toys in their showroom.

Their starting order is $1,000, which is good news for most purchasers. However, they only sell in the US. For the rest of the world, this is not good news.

8. Fun Express

Fun Express is a leading B2B provider of toys, novelties, gifts, and giveaways. They offer over 10,000 products and have 1.5 million square feet of warehouse space.

They are a professional toy wholesaler and can ship toys to you at wholesale prices no matter what area you are in.

At the same time, most of their toys are developed independently and designed and produced by themselves. Of course, if you want to design your own toys, they can help you.

The above is a list of the top 8 wholesale toys distributors. If you are a toy buyer, I hope you will find this article helpful in your toy supplier selection after reading it.

Of course, if you have more quality toy sourcing wholesalers, welcome to leave a message in the comment section to tell me. If you have any questions about toy sourcing, please feel free to leave me a message as well.

The post Top 8 Wholesale Toys Distributors List You Should Know Before You Wholesale Toys.￼ appeared first on Toys wholesalers.

The post Best 20 building bricks toy brands list — China “LEGO” toys brand appeared first on Toys wholesalers.
item.content:encoded:
When it comes to building block brands, I believe that most people’s first reaction is Lego. LEGO as the world’s largest building block brand, loved by countless people around the world.

In China, there are also many famous building block brands like Wange, Banbao, Sembo Block and so on. If you want to import block toys from China, then these Chinese block brands you must know.

Below, I will introduce you to the top 20 building block brands in China.

1. Qman

Brand name: Qman

Founded：1994

Category: Small particle building blocks

Full name of the company: Guangdong Qimeng Toy Industry Co.

Founded in 1984, the company has been committed to providing consumers with high quality and innovative products.

After more than 20 years of development, we now have a factory with more than 700 skilled workers and a top R&D and design team of more than 100 people in Guangzhou and Shantou, with more than 500 products in more than 30 series, exported to 40 countries and regions in Europe, the United States and Southeast Asia.

Previous
Next
Get Catalog

2. WANGE

Brand Name: WANGE
Founded：1999
Category：Small particles
Product series：Famous building / twister / pirate / greeting card / foundation building / creative change / car / power machinery / legion / police / base plate, etc.
Company name: Shantou Wange Culture and Education Technology Industrial Co.

Founded in 1999, Shantou Wanger Culture and Education Technology Industrial Limited is a national high-tech enterprise in the research and development, production and sales of culture and education products. In the field of educational building blocks to achieve focus, professional, dedicated, to do “more fun” building block toys and efforts to move forward.

Wanger’s products are divided into small particles and large particles. Small particles face consumers over 6 years old, large particles for children over 3 years old. Wanger has a lot of product themes, among which construction is the main theme of promotion and deep plowing.



Previous
Next

3. BanBao

Brand name：BanBao
Founded：2003
Category: small particles / technology group
Company name: Guangdong Bangbao Educational Toys Co.

Founded in 2003, Bonbao Puzzle is a high-tech joint venture specializing in the research and development, production, sales and service of educational toys, educational toys and precision molds, with the goal of “experiencing endless fun and creating infinite possibilities”.

With the educational concept of “learning through playing”, we have been developing products and building blocks for different age groups.

 

Previous
Next

4. Sluban

Brand name: Sluban

Founded：2004

Category：Small particles

Company name: Shantou Chenghai Century Friendship Toys Co.

Sluban brand has been operating successfully for 17 years and is well known both at home and abroad, and has achieved good results in sales both at home and abroad. The products are exported to cover countries and regions such as Middle East, North America, South America, Australia, Africa, etc.

In 2017, Sluban cooperated with Danish retail chain dealers and launched Sluban’s products in 33 chain stores in Denmark.

Previous
Next
Get Catalog

5. WOMA

Brand name: WOMA

Founded：2007

Category：Small particles

Full name of the company: Guangdong Woma Animation Toy Co.

From the love and pursuit of building blocks, Woma blocks continue to struggle, forge ahead, after more than ten years of precipitation development, has become a set of design, development, sales in one of the modern building block brand.

Woma blocks advocate the design elements of culture and the integration of building blocks particles, with the times, to give the product shape new educational significance, become the unique characteristics of the brand products.

Previous
Next

6. SEMBO BLOCK

Brand name: Sembo Block (SEMBO BLOCK)
Founded：2013
Category：Small particles / technology group
Product series: military / engineering / streetscape / car / girl series
Full name of the company: Guangdong Senbao Culture Industry Co.

Senbao blocks series products cover the whole age group of consumers, using blocks to interpret Chinese culture” is the positioning that Senbao blocks set for itself.

Senbao’s requirements for building blocks are on par with international first-tier manufacturers, while equipped with a 24-hour automated production workshop, with an annual output of 9.6 billion blocks.

In recent years, the brand has been actively upgrading the production hardware and production technology, and in 2020, it completed the intelligent automatic subcontracting production line and injection molding process upgrade.

Previous
Next

7. GUDI

Brand name：GUDI
Founded：2013
Category：Small particles
Product series: Yeroli / Creative Place / reincarnation of the demon king / my emperor million sleep / kakao friends / dream street scene / city racing / super product war team / Princess Alice / space and aviation / modern girl / city police / fire rescue / naval battle group / border assault, etc.
Full name of the company: Guangdong Xinlexin Science and Education Culture Co.

Gudi blocks since its establishment in 2013, adhere to the “pursuit of excellence, casting first-class brand” corporate philosophy, and effectively and strictly control the quality of products, the production of blocks are engraved with the word GUDI.

Gudi blocks of space and aviation series, the Navy series since its launch in 2016, continue to sell, and endure.

Previous
Next

8. BALODY

Brand name: BALODY
Founded：2015
Category: micro particles / mini particles
Product series：Cartoon image series/Animation series/national trend series
Company name: Shantou Liangao Toys Industrial Co.

In 2015, Shantou Liangao Toy Industry Co., Ltd. was established and created the brand of Beiludi.

Beiludi attaches great importance to product development and the speed of pushing new products, new products are launched every month, and the number of new products is over 100 every year.

Previous
Next

9. Wangao

Brand name: Wangao
Founded：  2015
Category：Small particles
Product Line: Racing / Military / National Tide / Space / Space Series
Company full name: Shantou Dagao Toy Industrial Co.

Shantou Dagao Toy Industrial Co. is a professional building block enterprise integrating R&D, production, sales and service. Our brand “Wangao” products have passed the domestic 3C certification, ISO9001 certification and foreign EN71, 10P, CE, ASTM, HR4040, CPC and other certifications, and have a number of qualifications in the toy industry testing. 

The company has a strong development team and various advanced machines and equipments in the industry, with more than 200 sets of high precision injection machines and 12 fully automatic packaging lines, with the advantage of super quality and production cost, the products are exported to Europe, America, Japan and Korea and other overseas markets, and are widely favored by consumers.

Previous
Next

10. cada

Brand name: CaDA blocks
Founded：2016
Category: small particles / technology group; large / medium particles
Product series: Master series / large particle series / science and education series / engineering car series / military series / gun series / robot series / sports car series 
Company name: Guangdong Double Eagle Toy Industry Co.

CADA blocks was founded in 2016, relying on the strength and R & D technology of Double Eagle Toys, block line products out of their own unique route. The brand respects the creative ethos at home and abroad, and takes the initiative to communicate with outstanding mocers for product licensing contracts.

The company has more than 50 people R & D technical team, ahead of market demand, design and production of a variety of styles praise, quality, parents and children love the products.

Previous
Next
Get Catalog

11. PANLOS

Brand name:  PANLOS
Founded：2016
Category：Small particles
Product Series: Ultraman genuine authorized series / military authorized series / cosmic escort authorized series / military series / dinosaur series / multi-variable combination series / block gun series / creative series / music box series / girl series, etc.
Company name: Shantou Chenghai District Huada Toys Co.

Shantou Chenghai District Huada Toys Co. was established in 1997, after more than 20 years of operation, has developed into a large private enterprise integrating research and development, production and domestic and international sales.

 

Previous
Next

12. XINGBAO

Brand name: XINGBAO
Founded：2016
Category: small particles
Product series: Running kart series / Chinese street series / 8 in one series / modern street series / city series / military series / battlefield fire series / super car series / technology car series / girl series
Company full name: Guangdong Xingbao Electronic Technology Co.

Founded in December 2016, Xingbao Building Blocks has insisted on the road of original design since its inception, and the brand launched the China Street series, which pioneered the Chinese style building blocks and was liked by consumers.

The company has advanced production injection molding equipment, a variety of high-precision building block molds, a full range of building block plastic parts, adhering to the “production is the building block, the delivery is happy” concept, independent research and development of distinctive building block products.

Previous
Next

13. Forange

Brand name: Forange
Founded：2017
Category：Small particles
Product Line: Simulation dinosaur / simulation military model / bobblehead / mini collection / intelligent technology / blocks and flowers / dream hut / speed supercar / city airport /
Company name: Shantou Chenghai District Meigao Bao Toys Co.

Forange is an independent block brand of Shantou Megabox Toys Co., Ltd, founded in 2017, dedicated to providing children with professional, high-quality and fun growth companion blocks. The brand identity of Forange is a square orange, which means “to stimulate children’s creativity without constraint”.

Forange is a popular plastic building block, with a wealth of basic modules, through these basic modules, children can build their favorite shape, Square Orange products are suitable for children aged 6-14 years old, characterized by safety, variety, and can be assembled multiple times.

Previous
Next

14. ZHEGAO

Brand name: Zhegao
Founded:  2017
Category: small particles / mini-particles / micro-particles
Product Series: (small particles) girl / space / technology car / music box series; (mini particles) camera / snack car / amusement park series; street scene series
Company Name：Shantou Chenghai District Qunlong Plastic Products Co.

Founded in 2017, the brand slogan: family enlightenment building blocks.

So that children can tap their creativity, and cultivate the spirit of creativity and exploration of children. Deep research, insist on originality, focus on details, create with heart, uphold the spirit of excellence in quality, craftsmanship – love of family – wisdom – safety of the 4 craftsmanship concept.

Previous
Next

15. Keeppley

Brand name: Keeppley
Founded：2019
Category：Small particles
Company full name: Guangdong Qimeng Toy Industry Co.

Keeppley brand belongs to Guangdong Qimeng Toys Industry Co. Keeppley Toys was formerly known as Shantou Chenghai District Huaxin Plastic Mould Factory, which was established in 1984. For decades, Qimeng has insisted on independent research and innovation, and produced each product with craftsmanship.

Keeppley is a new generation of building block brand founded in 2019, is committed to do belong to the new generation of trendy play blocks.

Previous
Next

16. HAPPYBUILD

Brand name: HAPPYBUILD
Founded：2019
Category：Small particles / technology group
Cooperation IP：Forbidden City stationery / Toyota
Company full name: Guangdong Xinyu Technology Co.

Founded in 1997, Guangdong Xinyu Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech integrated enterprise with 23 years of experience in R&D, production, sales and service, specializing in the production of remote control intelligent toys and educational building block toys.

The company has the leading R&D team of remote control intelligent toys and educational building block toys in China. Xinyu’s “Yuechuang” building block brand was established in 2019 and is a newcomer to the building block field. Rich product line to meet the different needs of consumers in the market.

Xinyu has accumulated a wealth of technical experience over the years and has advanced production equipment and testing instruments, providing a very strong foundation and guarantee for the transition into the building block market.

 

Previous
Next
Get Catalog

17. Decool

Brand name: Decool
Founded：2019
Category：Small particles / technology group
Company name: Shantou Decool Science & Technology Toys Co.

Shantou Decool Science & Technology Toys Co. is an enterprise rich in production experience for many years, with advanced production equipment and high technical level, has formed a certain scale, and has been well received in the peer!

The company has always pursued the production and management policy of “pragmatic and progressive, credibility first, innovation, quality to win”, and the products sell well around the world, and are welcomed by customers in Europe, South America, Africa, the Middle East, Southeast Asia and other countries and regions.

Previous
Next

18. MUWAN

Brand name: MUWAN
Founded：1973
Category：Wooden building blocks
Cooperation IP：Fisher / Marvel / Disney / B.Duck / Thomas
Company full name: Zhejiang Wooden Play Family Toys Co.

Since 1973, nearly half a century of heritage and development, from the beginning of a small step, gradually based on the ” Zhejiang famous brand ” national brand, MUWAN with meticulous craftsmanship of wooden toys, a firm pace, with a solid industrial base, with the times of innovative thinking to maintain a strong corporate vitality.

Previous
Next

19. KIDIAN

Brand name: KIDIAN
Founded：2019
Category：Large / medium particles
Full name of the company：Guangdong Jiaqi Technology Education Co.

Founded in 2002, Jiaqi Technology has been developing around the main business of toys.

Under the role of peripheral environment, market demand and other factors, Jiaqi Technology’s outreach has been expanded to a large extent, and now mainly contains intelligent robots, infant and toddler series, intelligent building blocks, transforming toys and other product lines.

 

Previous
Next

20. BeiMei

Brand name: Beimei
Founded: 2015
Category：Large / medium particles
Product Series: Block table and chairs / large particle building blocks / science education blocks / programming blocks, etc.
Company name: Shantou Chenghai District Longqi Toys Factory

“Beimei” brand, the team adheres to the original intention of entering the toy industry, “I have a dream, that is, to make childhood life better”, hoping to bring children a joyful and interesting childhood with creative products and quality experience, and encourage them to bravely explore to unleash their talents.

 

Previous
Next

21. Made in China Building Blocks FAQ

1. What is the quality of the building blocks made in China today?

Now the quality of China-made blocks has long surpassed the previous! Many of the best Chinese blocks have passed the stringent EU CE certification, ASTM certification and 3C national certification for the Chinese toy industry!

And now Chinese blocks are cheap and of good quality, you can rest assured that you are sourcing blocks from China.

2.Compared to LEGO, what are the advantages and disadvantages of Chinese-made building blocks?

I think, compared to LEGO, the advantage of the Chinese production of blocks is cost-effective, from playability, ornamental and other perspectives can compete with LEGO!

And the Forbidden City national trend, the wandering earth, space culture and creativity and so on well-known domestic IP are through the various Chinese block manufacturers to achieve the blocks, cultural advantages are also very obvious!

However, we also need to see the shortcomings of Chinese building blocks. At present, the quality of the product does not fully achieve a high level of quality of all, most of the uneven, there are high quality at the same time there are also low-quality situation.In addition, the creative design also needs to be strengthened in order to catch up with LEGO!

Chinese building block brand, need time, we also need to give him a chance to develop.

3. Are there still problems with Chinese blocks copying and infringing LEGO?

LEGO’s block patent has actually expired a long time ago, so all building blocks manufacturers can legally use block design.

Today LEGO is relying on the creative design of blocks and the quality of its own blocks to ensure the position of the leading brand brother. I believe that the Chinese made blocks brand will be able to catch up, and there is indeed this trend!

For more information about the China Building Blocks brand, or to get the China Building Blocks catalog, please contact us, or leave a comment and let me know.

The post Best 20 building bricks toy brands list — China “LEGO” toys brand appeared first on Toys wholesalers.

Baigou toy wholesale market–for the cheap plush toy 1.4. Yangzhou toy wholesale market–for the high-quality plush toy 1.5. Yongxing International Toys Wholesale City–In Shandong Linyi 2. Where […]

The post How to find China Toy Suppliers? Market, Manufacturers, Fairs, and Website appeared first on Toys wholesalers.
item.content:encoded:
1. Top 5 toys wholesale market to find toys wholesalers in China.

1.1. Yiwu toy wholesale market–the most significant market

1.2. Guangzhou toy wholesale market–the earliest market

1.3. Baigou toy wholesale market–for the cheap plush toy

1.4. Yangzhou toy wholesale market–for the high-quality plush toy

1.5. Yongxing International Toys Wholesale City–In Shandong Linyi

2. Where to find China Toy Suppliers?

2.1. China toys wholesale market

2.2 toy manufacturing bases in China

2.3. Toys fairs in China

2.4. China online website

2.5. Search China toys manufacturers on Google

2.6 Get help from a toys sourcing agent

3. How to import China toys

STEP 1: Require a quote from China toys suppliers

STEP 2: Sourcing toys from China toys manufacturers

STEP 3: Confirm orders with China toy supplier

STEP 4: Arrange production, then follow up the order 

STEP 5: Quality inspection

STEP 6: Loading and Shipping

Where do I find the toy suppliers in China? For most people who want to import toys from China, this question is crucial and is your first step in buying toys from China.

The toys wholesale markets are the best place to start your search for toys wholesale suppliers. Finding toys suppliers from the toys manufacturing bases is a good choice; you can talk face-to-face with factories. Also, you can visit toys fairs in China to find toy suppliers or find the toys buying agent for help. If you can’t come to China, you also can search for toys wholesalers from Google and China wholesale websites.

In this guide, we will show you some tips on how to find a reliable toy supplier that can help you importing toys from China without any problems.

In this guide, we will show you some tips on finding a reliable toy supplier that can help you importing cheap toys from China without any problems.
This article is divided into two parts. Part 1 covers 6 ways to find Chinese suppliers, and part two covers Things you need to know about dealing with Toy suppliers.

1. 6 ways to find Toys suppliers in China

1.1. Best 5 China toy wholesale market

Generally speaking, if you want to wholesale more styles of cheap toys quickly, then China wholesale toy market is your best choice.

Because in the wholesale market in China, you can find numerous wholesalers who wholesale all sorts of toys. Here, you can complete one-stop toy shopping and buy wholesale all kinds of toys that you want to buy.

There are five most profitable toy markets in China, the largest of which is the Yiwu Toy Market. You can find all kinds of toys here, such as plastic toys, inflatable toys, plush toys, puzzle toys, diy toys, girl toys, electronic toys, remote control toys, and so on.

Below is a description of the five largest wholesale toy markets in China. He speaks to help you find Chinese toy suppliers quickly.

1.1.1 Yiwu toy wholesale market--the most significant market

Yiwu Toy Market is located in District 1 of Yiwu International Trade City and is China’s largest toys wholesale market. There are more than 2,000 toy wholesale stores here, which sell thousands of toys of different categories from all over China.

It means that you can find 2000+ wholesale toy suppliers here and find hundreds of different toys from each toys wholesaler. Sounds crazy, right?

Why can you buy wholesale the cheapest toys in the Yiwu toys market?  Because the toy suppliers here are the general national agents of toy factories, and their prices are based on many expenses. So most of the time, you will find that even if you find a factory, after comparing the price, you will find that the price is still lower in the Yiwu market.

Unfortunately, though, most wholesale toy suppliers here do not speak English, so you better need to get yourself an English translator or toys buying agent to take you along and translate to facilitate communicating correctly with the toys suppliers.

Of course, I recommend finding a toy buying agent, like Poxst Services. After all, if you are done purchasing toys, you still have to think about paying, placing orders, receiving the goods, loading, shipping, etc. They will help you out. And give you a good series of purchasing plans.

These toy sourcing agents usually charge 3-5% commission but can help you with everything about sourcing toys. They will even pick you up at the airport when you first arrive in Yiwu.

1.1.2 Guangzhou toys wholesale market--the earliest market

Guangdong is the world’s most giant toy and gift production base, and the Guangzhou toy wholesale market is also the most important one in southern China. Guangzhou Yidelu Toys Business District is one of China’s most critical toy gift circulations and trading bases, including International Toys Boutique City, Zhonggang Toys Wholesale City, Wanling International Toys Boutique Plaza, Jialesi Toys City.

For many experienced buyers, the Guangzhou toys market is where they must visit. Several toy markets here gather toy wholesalers from all over China. Various toys are purchased here, such as baby toys, wooden toys, plastic toys, electric toys, holiday toys, etc.

1.1.3 Baigou toy wholesale market--for the cheap plush toy

Baigou Wholesale Toy Market is located in Hebei Province, China. You can find plush toys and general plastic toys suppliers here. If you are a plush toy gift buyer or do not have high requirements for the quality of plush toys, then this market is a good choice for you.

1.1.4 Yangzhou toys wholesale market--for the high-quality plush toy

As the plush toy gift capital of China, Yangzhou Wutinglong International Toys City mainly sells plush toys. There are thousands of factories here, and there are more than 4,500 stores in the market. In the market, you can buy thousands of different types of plush toys. Here, you can not only buy cheap plush toys. If you have high requirements for product quality or need to customize your plush toys, then Yangzhou plush toys market is your best choice.

In addition to selling plush toys, there is also a plush toy accessories market. You can buy all kinds of plush toy accessories, such as glasses, fabrics, etc., here. If you need high-quality plush toys, want to find experienced plush toy factory cooperation, or purchase plush toy accessories, the Yangzhou plush toy market is a good choice for you.

1.1.5 Yongxing International Toys Wholesale City--In Shandong Linyi

Yongxing International Toy Professional Wholesale City is currently the only toy professional wholesale market in Shandong Province and China’s second-largest toy professional market. There are about a thousand toy manufacturers, large and small. It is mainly divided into three areas: A, B, and C. Area A is primarily engaged in electric toys, baby carriages, inflatable toys, etc .; area B is involved in various plastic toys; area C is mainly engaged in multiple plush toys.

But most of the toys sold here are targeted at the Chinese market, and the packaging is generally Chinese.

1.2. Top 5 major toy manufacturing bases in China

China has 5 major toy manufacturing bases.

How to find wholesale toy manufacturers in China?

If you are looking for wooden toys, you should go to Yunhe. 

If you are looking for plush toys, you need to go to Yangzhou and Baigou.

Shantou is your best choice if you are looking for a plastic toy or electronic toymaker. 

If you are looking for Barbie manufacturers, then Jieyang is your best choice.

1.2.1 Yunhe, Zhejiang--the city with most wooden toys manufacturers

Chinese wooden toy city–Yunhe, is located in Lishui City, Zhejiang Province. There are more than 500 wooden toy manufacturers in this city, and the products are exported to more than 30 countries and regions such as Europe, America, Japan.

Almost all wooden toys in China are produced by factories here. But there are no toy exhibition halls to help you find the location of these factories, so you’d better come here with your toy sourcing agent. Otherwise, you cannot find the exact location of the factory. Also, you can contact us for help.

1.2.2 Baigou and Yangzhou all are the city with plush toys manufacturer

Baigou, the city for the plush toy manufacturer

Hebei Baigou is one of the main plush toy production bases in China. There are thousands of plush toy factories here. Here you can find and purchase suitable plush toy manufacturers. In addition to their regular products, you can also ask the factory to customize your plush toys or even OEM processing.

The plush toys produced here are cheap and of average quality. It is suitable for the purchase of promotion gifts or low-end plush toys. Before you decide to come, you can contact us. Our guide will help you make a good route and take you to find the best toy factory. You don’t have to worry about language and geographical issues.

Yangzhou, Capital of Plush Toys and Gifts in China

As the earliest and largest production base of plush toys in China, Yangzhou is the “Capital of Plush Toys and Gifts in China.” Yangzhou is the traditional plush toy design and production hometown, occupying more than 50% of the global plush toy market.

The factory here has long-term cooperation with Wal-Mart, Target, Disney, and many other companies and has supplied Amazon merchants for a long time. The factory has experience in product design, proofing, production, and packaging. If you need to purchase custom high-end, high-quality plush toys and find professional factory cooperation, then Yangzhou is your best choice.

1.2.3 Chenghai, Shantou, the hometown of plastic toys

The birthplace of all plastic toys, educational toys, and electric toys in Chenghai, Shantou, the most toy factories is also located here. There are more than 12,000+ toy factories and china toy manufacturers here. Whether you are looking for the remote control car, drone, pretend play toy, riding toy, puzzle, beach toy, almost kids toy, you know all are produced here.

In Chenghai, almost all toys are displayed in the toy exhibition halls. By visiting the toy exhibition halls, you can find various toys, get prices, check factory information directly, and even communicate face-to-face with the best toy manufacturers. These toy exhibition halls only provide quotations and factory information but do not sell products. Their primary income comes from toy factory rents.

How to work in a toy exhibition hall? Picking toys in the exhibition hall is like shopping in a supermarket. You put your target toys in the shopping cart, and the staff will scan the barcode to show you the details of the toys. Finally, you will receive a quotation list of the toys you selected. You can read this site(Shantou toys market guide) about the Chenghai toy exhibition hall.

1.2.4 Barbie doll toy industry--Located in Jieyang, Guangdong, nearby Chenghai

The production base of Barbie dolls is located in Jieyang, Guangdong. There are hundreds of factories producing various shapes of Barbie dolls. These factories are very professional. Here you can buy all kinds of Barbie dolls you want, including Disney and other authorized genuine Barbie dolls. These factories also support OEM. You can customize your Barbie doll in terms of style, clothing, accessories, etc.

1.3. Top 6 toy fairs to finding China toy suppliers

The Toys Fairs has always been one of the most important ways to find toy factories and new toy products. The buyers can find many excellent factories and many new products at the toy exhibition. Most importantly, they can talk face to face with the toys factories. For factories to cooperate with customers, they often give the lowest price to attract customers.

Below I have organized 6 toy fairs worth visiting in China. In addition, you can contact us for more toy exhibition information and ask your sourcing agent to guide you to see the toys fair.

China Toy Fairs Time Location Acreage
1. Hongkong Toys & Games Fair
01-07 ~ 01-10 every year
Hong Kong Convention & Exhibition
55580 ㎡
2. Wuhan International Toy Industry Expo
03-08 ~ 03-10 every year
Wuhan International Convention and Exhibition Center
30000 ㎡
3. Guangzhou International Toy & Education Fair
04-08 ~ 04-10 every year
Guangzhou poly world trade expo
81200 ㎡
4. Canton Fair
4-23~4-27 every year
Guangzhou Pazhou International Exhibition Center
30000 ㎡
5. The China International Toy Fair
10-16 ~ 10-18 every year
Shanghai New International Expo Centre
220000 ㎡
6. Hong Kong International Toys & Gifts Fair
10-20 ~ 10-23 every year
Hong Kong Convention & Exhibition
24000 ㎡

The great thing about attending Canton Fair is that you can directly find Chinese toys suppliers and factories, learn about products, and meet face-to-face with Chinese suppliers and factories.

Unlike Alibaba and other online sites, you can directly understand and judge whether the supplier meets your requirements, from price, product quality in all aspects, he more time-saving.

After all, it isn’t effortless for you to understand a Chinese toy factory with pictures and text descriptions and know if it is suitable for you.

The best thing about China toys Fair is that it gathers suppliers and factories from all over China, and you can easily find what you want to buy or have them make what you want to make for you.

The best part is that they showcase the toys they make, and you can touch and feel the products yourself to get an idea of their quality.


Moreover, the China toys fair is free to attend. By coming here, you can get information about hundreds of toy suppliers at a low cost and then pick the most suitable Chinese toy manufacturer to produce the products you want.

1.4. Top 6 wholesale toys websites to finding the china toy suppliers

There are toy markets here in China and some online wholesale sites to help you import toys from China to your country. The most famous is Alibaba. In addition to Alibaba, there are Global Sources, DHgate, Made In China, Yiwu Go, and Toys Market Online.

Due to the impact of COVID-19, all the toys fair was canceled, and it also was impossible to come to China, so wholesale toys online are the most suitable way to help you continue the toy business. 

For small buyers, like Amazon sellers or other retailers, sourcing China toys by the Chinese wholesale website is suitable. Below I will introduce to you 6 Chinese wholesale websites and our toy market online. This guide can help you source toys from China without having to leave home.

1.4.1 Alibaba--The largest Chinese wholesale website

As the world’s largest wholesale website, almost everyone has heard of Alibaba and also has the experience of wholesale toys on it. 

Most of Alibaba’s suppliers are factories, and some are wholesalers. Here you can search for many toys you want, and you can quickly contact the supplier to confirm the price, product information, etc. You don’t need to consider the MOQ here. They usually accept orders of 500-1000 USD.

When purchasing toys on Alibaba, you need to know the balance of product quality and price. After selecting the product, you can confirm the quality of the sample with the store. You can also bargain with the supplier through the online chat tool if you have a large number.

1.4.2 DHgate

Is DHgate safe? Of course!

Last year, DHgate’s transaction volume was more than $14 billion.

The most extensive customer base in the world makes it a trustworthy online store with a good reputation. Customers can buy from there confidently and enjoy fast shipping service as well as a friendly 24/24 support team.

In conclusion, we find that DHgate is a credible and trustworthy store that is worth your trust. If you are hesitating, why not buy from DHgate at a small but very reasonable price?

DHgate does not have MOQ requirements. You can buy at least one or two products. If you have a large number, you can bargain with them. There are not many types of toys here, more suitable for retailers.

1.4.3 Globalsources

There are many large factories and sizeable foreign trade companies on Globalsources. There are a total of 900+ suppliers wholesale about 40,000 toys.

The MOQ here is usually high. You can use the online chat tool to communicate with the supplier. You can also customize your toys. They typically take longer to produce toys, about 7-15 days.

1.4.4 Made In China

Made in China is similar to Global Sources, and their suppliers are mainly factories and large foreign trade companies. Usually, as long as the quantity meets the supplier’s requirements, they support OEM and ODM.


A total of 2,000+ toy factories sell nearly 280,000 toys here. MQO depends on different factories. You need to confirm with the factory in advance. After securing the quantity, you can ensure the final price and delivery time with the factory. If it is in stock, the delivery time will be fast.

1.4.5 Yiwu Go

Yiwu Go is the online website of Yiwu International Trade City. Each supplier corresponds to a shop on this market. The suppliers here are mainly wholesalers. You can buy toys from here at a lower price and a smaller MOQ. You can learn more information from this guide: Yiwu toys market guide.


Yiwu go is not suitable for purchasing toys directly on the website. You can use this website to learn about the shop of the Yiwu toy market and the types of toys they sell in advance. Because most of the suppliers here do not understand English, usually there is little time to manage online stores.

1.4.6 Toys Showroom Online

Toys Showroom Online was created jointly by several toy showrooms in Chenghai. About the Shantou toy showroom, you can study my article – the Shantou toy exhibition hall. 

Buyers who have been to the toy showroom should know that we can find almost all toys made in China and get detailed information about toys and manufacturers in the Shantou Toy Showroom.

Likewise, now you can find all the toys and get the prices in the toy showroom online. It is simply incredible.

The operation is also effortless. After opening the website, you can browse the site to find your favorite toys and add them to your shopping cart.

Of course, you can also search the toy’s name to find the toy you want and add it to your shopping cart. Even the most incredible thing is that you can find the toys you are interested in by searching through images. It is simply so convenient and so good for you.

Each toy has a detail page. You can view the detailed parameters of the product, including Packaging, Carton size, Quantity, Authentication, etc. If the toy is what you want, add it to the cart.

Finally, click on the shopping cart, fill in your personal information and details and submit. The staff will give you a quote within 24 hours.

Coming through the toy showroom online to find Chinese toy suppliers is the most practical and accessible way I have seen.

Generally speaking, the MOQ of toys is more than 3 cartons. If the factory has stock, You can buy one carton. You can confirm these details with your sourcing agent. And you also can ask for the catalog to check. It’s also convenient for you to select toys.

1.5. Search China toy manufacturer on google

Browse toymakers on google likewise are the means of finding toy suppliers in China.

The most convenient method to discover toy manufacturers in China where your target audience hangs out is to utilize these search strings in Google:

“keyword manufacturers in China”;
“keyword” + “supplier in China”;
“keyword” + “factory”+“China”;
“keyword” + “China”+“manufacturer”.

1.6. Toys buying agent - help you import toys from China.

If you have no idea about toys buying agents, you can read our post about toys buying agents--Toy sourcing agents – What do they do? How to find? How much do they cost?

In addition to the above methods, there is another ideal way to discover Chinese providers: to assist you in locating toymakers via Chinese toys agents, like Poxst Service.

What is Poxst Service？ The specialist toys sourcing agent in China has 8 years of toy sourcing experience, can assist you in wholesale toys from China. They can help you to acquire toys directly from the toy factory for a low-cost cost.

Toy sourcing representatives can assist you in finding the wholesale toy suppliers in China as opposed to you. They have collaboration with 5000+ toy factories that supply substantial supply chain assistance. After locating toy distributors, they will offer you the quotation and also aid you import toys from China.

1.6.1 How toy sourcing agents can help you?

For buyers new to toy sourcing in China, a toy sourcing agent is the best solution. China toy agents generally provide a one-stop sourcing service, helping you find China wholesale toy suppliers and then quote you. Then help you do all the toy sourcing, order placement, production, quality check, and shipping to you.

STEP 1: Require A Quote

Suppose you want to learn how to source toys from China or buy wholesale toys directly from Chinese manufacturers. Just send us a request for a quote, and our sourcing agents will help you with everything you need to do to import toys from China.

STEP 2: Products Sourcing

Your toy buying agent will help you contact toy suppliers for catalogs or quotes. Or you provide pictures and information about the toys you want to purchase, and the sourcing agent will help you find factories and get quotes for you.

STEP 3: Confirm Orders

Once you have confirmed your order, your sourcing agent will help you contact various Chinese toy manufacturers to help you arrange your order according to your requirements.

STEP 4: Arrange Production

We will place your order with the factory. If there are any problems during the ordered arrangement and production, we will communicate with you in time.

STEP 5: Quality Inspection

When all production is complete, your buying agent will go to the factory and help you inspect the toys one by one to check the quality and whether they meet your requirements. Finally, he will send you the inspection report.

STEP 6: Loading and Shipping

Finally, your China sourcing agent will contact your shipping agent or contact his shipping agent to help you arrange the container and ultimately help you load and ship it out.

2. Things you need to know about dealing with Toy suppliers

2.1. What is the biggest problem you have in communicating with Chinese toy suppliers?

When communicating with Chinese toy suppliers, you have to remember that most don’t speak English very well.

They may have studied English in school, and most of them cannot speak or understand English well. Their reading skills are good, but for English listening comprehension, they may be terrible.

Therefore, when you communicate with a Chinese supplier, it is best to slow down and use simple English to express what you want to say.

If you communicate like standard English, most of them won’t understand you but can only nod their heads because they don’t want to interrupt you.

Of course, now there is translation software on your phone. You can use the translation software to talk to toy suppliers when they can’t understand.

The most efficient way or find a Chinese purchasing agent to assist you in translation and communication. This way, you can easily pass your ideas to the Chinese supplier and complete good communication.

2.2. How to Request a Quote from China toy supplier

Requesting a quote from a Chinese toys supplier is not as simple as asking for a price. For imported products, in addition to knowing the price, you need to know the MOQ, delivery time, payment terms, product samples, volume and gross weight, etc.

2.2.1 Price

There’s a lot to know about price here. First of all, you need to know EXW, FOB, CIF, CFR. Once you see these quotation methods, choose the one that suits you to negotiate with the factory.

Generally speaking, it is better to let the factory quote EXW price to compare it with other factories. You can compare the lowest price.

Secondly, you need to request quotes from several wholesalers or suppliers and understand the product parameters corresponding to their price, such as product quality, size, material grammage, etc. All these factors will affect the price.

In addition, if you order a large enough quantity, you can also understand to let the factory recheck the price and give you a discount. Generally speaking, the factory quotes are based on the amount. The more quantity you have, the lower the price.

2.2.2 MOQ

You must ask the Chinese manufacturer if there is a minimum order quantity for the picking product. Generally speaking, if you want to purchase small amounts of products, Yiwu wholesale market is more suitable. These wholesalers typically have stock, and naturally, MOQ is a box of goods.

If you communicate with the factory, you must ask for MOQ. Most factories do not prepare the stock. They arrange production according to orders.

2.2.3 Delivery time

You need to ask the Chinese wholesale supplier about the delivery time. Similarly, if you buy wholesale from a wholesaler in the Yiwu market, they usually have a lead time of no more than 5 days.

If you are looking for Chinese factories to order products, you must ask about the delivery time. Most of them produce to order. If they have a lot of orders waiting to be made, then the delivery time to you will become very long and could potentially affect your sales cycle, especially if you want holiday items.

2.2.4 Payment terms

The payment method is also one of the most critical negotiation aspects in the communication process with Chinese wholesale suppliers.

First, you need to understand several standard payment methods: T/T, L/C, D/P D/A.

Generally, Chinese suppliers expect a T/T payment method, i.e., a 30% deposit and final payment before shipment.

2.2.5 Product Samples

After the order is confirmed, it is necessary to ask for product samples from the supplier. 

Because you can use the quality of the samples as a reference standard to check the quality of the products produced by the factory and prevent the factory from lowering the rate in production.

After production, you can also request samples from your China factory to ensure that the product meets your quality standards.

2.3. How to select the suitable toy suppliers?

Select suitable toy suppliers according to your toy business. If you are a toy retailer, wholesale toys from wholesale toys websites or wholesale toy markets are the best option. If you are a wholesaler or want to buy toys in bulk, you need to go to toy manufacturing bases or toy fairs to find wholesale toy suppliers for you.

You also need to find out if the toy supplier can provide toys that meet the You also need to find out if the toy supplier can provide toys that meet the quality toys requirements. requirements. You can check their qualifications and toy certificates. If you want to ship toys from China to Europe, you can ask if the factory has an EN71 test guarantee number and a CE certificate. If you’re going to import toys from China to the USA, their toys must comply with ASTM F963 standards. If you’re selling toys on Amazon, then the toys you purchase must have a CPC certificate.

Of course, this is easiest for you if you find a toy sourcing agent to help you choose the right toy supplier. Because all you need to do is tell them your requirements and help you find the right toy supplier for you, you don’t need to worry about that.

Conclusion

It is all a complete guide on finding a toy supplier from China, if you have any further questions, please be kind enough to contact us, and we will assist you.

The post How to find China Toy Suppliers? Market, Manufacturers, Fairs, and Website appeared first on Toys wholesalers.

item.title: Where to find toy manufacturing in China
item.dc:creator: Zero Chan
item.description:
China toys manufacturing is located in Chenghai District, Shantou City, Guangdong Province. It is home to almost 80% of China toys manufacturers. Generally, the buyers call China toys directly Shantou toys or Chenghai toys. We know that the Yiwu toys wholesale market is the largest toys wholesale market in China. When you wholesale toys from […]

The post Where to find toy manufacturing in China appeared first on Toys wholesalers.
item.content:encoded:
China toys manufacturing is located in Chenghai District, Shantou City, Guangdong Province. It is home to almost 80% of China toys manufacturers. Generally, the buyers call China toys directly Shantou toys or Chenghai toys.

We know that the Yiwu toys wholesale market is the largest toys wholesale market in China. When you wholesale toys from China, the Yiwu toy market is the best place for you. Because you can buy many different styles of toys in the same store and the MOQ is as low as 1 carton and the price is cheap.

But if you want to find toy manufacturing in China, or buy directly from China toys factories or manufacturers, Shantou is you must visit the place. 

Who should import toys from Shantou?

#1. For the big buyers or importers, who want to import toys directly from the toys factories of china manufacturers.

#2. People can purchase toys with more than three cartons for each model.

#3. The importer can buy a whole container of toys.

#4. People who want to custom their own toy’s packing or customize toys. 

#5. People like supermarkets or big retailers who want to purchase more styles of toys.

For the above people who want to come to China to sourcing toys, then Shantou Chenghai is the place you must go to import toys from China. 

How to find China toys manufacturers in Shantou

China toys manufacturing is in Shantou, and China toy manufacturers could be found in the toy exhibition hall, also known as the toy showroom. There are many different toy exhibition halls in Chenghai, each displaying thousands of different toys from different factories.

What’s the toy exhibition hall？ The toy exhibition hall is where toys from all the different toy factories are displayed, all on the shelves, just like a supermarket. The toy exhibition hall is the place showing all the toys from the different China toy manufacturers. And all the toys are displaying on the shelves, just like a supermarket.

Because of the toy exhibition hall, finding a China toy factory is as easy as visiting a supermarket for toy import importers. Because of all the toys displayed here, you can view all the information, including product information, price, factory information, etc.

Top 5 exhibition halls in Shantou

There are many toy exhibition halls in Shantou. But not every hall is worth visiting. We only need to know the top 5 toy halls, because, through these 5 halls, you can find almost all Shantou toy manufacturers.

#1. HOTON TOYS EXHIBITION HALL

Hoton Toys exhibition hall is one of Shantou’s biggest toys showrooms and is the most popular one. It has more than 15,000 square meters showing area, Showing 270,000+ toys, also most importantly, you can find 5000+ toys manufacturers here.

As the toys buyer or importer, here you can enjoy the best service. When you are hungry, they will help you prepare food; when you are tired, they will prepare a lounge for you; if you want to drink some wine, they can even help you prepare dozens of different types of wine for you to drink.

#2. CBH TOYS EXHIBITION HALL

CBH toys exhibition hall also is a must-visit place if you want to find toys manufacturers. It has more than 13,000 square meters showing area, showing 250,000+ toys. Also, you can select your interested toys and check the factory detail from the staff.

#3. ON TOP TOYS EXHIBITION HALL

On Top toys exhibition hall is the earliest toy showroom in Shantou, most toys from different toy manufacturers are showing here. It has a 16,000 square meters showing area, showing 290,000+ toys, and also you can find out more than 6000+ toy factories here.

#4. YS WIN-WIN TOYS EXHIBITION HALL

YS Win-Win toys exhibition hall is the best service toys showrooms in Shantou. It has more than 16,000 square meters showing area, showing 240,000+ toys. And you can find all kinds of toys from more than 6,000+ exhibiting toys factories. Even if you need, the factories can come to communicate with you about the toy business.

#5. HK TOYS EXHIBITION HALL

HK toys exhibition hall also is the most popular toys showroom in Shantou. It has more than 12,000 square meters showing area, showing 180,000+ toys. And you can find more than 5,000+ toys factories here.

What’s inside of the exhibition hall

The toy exhibition hall is like a big supermarket, which holds countless shelves with many toys displayed on the shelves. In addition to several floors of the large exhibition hall, each floor of the hall has a bar where you can rest, drink coffee, etc.

There are lounges on each floor where you can rest and wait when you are tired, or when you finish your work, and the staff will give you a quotation sheet with factory information and prices.

Of course, if you want to enter the showroom, you must be accompanied by an interpreter or toy buying agent. Because the showroom staff basically does not speak English, there will be a big problem in communication if you go there by yourself.

How to find toy manufacturers in China online

You can find Chinese toy manufacturers by searching Google for keywords, like “beach toy manufacturers in China”. Of course, you can Alibaba search for China toy factories. These are not the most effective. The most effective and direct way to find toy manufacturers is through an online toy exhibition hall.

Due to COVID-19, many buyers cannot come to China to purchase toys. This becomes very difficult for them to find toy suppliers. 

Shantou Toy Showroom has made its toy and manufacturer resources into a website so that people can select toys and get quotations and factory information directly from the website. This makes importing toys from China much easier.

Just like shopping online, you can search for toy keywords to find the toy you want, like “beach toys”. Of course, you can also use image search to find the same or similar toys. Finally, add the toys you are interested in into your shopping cart and submit an offer in the shopping cart. The staff will give you a complete quote within 24 hours.

What are the toy companies in China?

In Shantou, in addition to toy exhibition halls, many toy companies will also have toy showrooms. Of course these toy showrooms you can also pick up a large number of toys and get quotes. But you can’t get direct information about toy manufacturers because they are the wholesaler. 

However, these toy companies have a better price because they have been cooperating with toy factories for a long time, and they can provide one-stop sourcing services, including quotation, order placement, receiving, inspection, container loading and shipping. These are things that toy exhibition halls cannot do, because they just supply quotation to you.

Top 5 China toys company

#1. MK Toys company

MK Toys, located in Chenghai, is one of the largest toy suppliers in China. They have over 10,000 square meters of showroom, you can pick and get a quote directly from their toy showroom. They will contact you and give you a quote.

#2. Poxst Service

Poxst Service is one of the most professional wholesale toy suppliers and professional toy sourcing agents in China. They don’t have their own independent showroom, they all take you to the toy exhibition hall to pick samples and help you get the lowest price with the factory.

Unlike other toy companies, they only charge a commission and do not make a difference from the product. So if you want to buy toys directly from Chinese toy manufacturers and get the lowest price, they are your best choice.

#3. HangWing Toys company

HangWing Toys is also like the Mk toys company, they have big toys showroom and showing lots of toys. Also, you can buy directly from them, but you better need to compare the prices as they may be higher.

#4. Bigtree Toys company

Big Tree Toys Co. is located in Chenghai, Shantou, with a total area of 23,000㎡and 30,000㎡ building area. We own the largest showroom in Shantou which covers an area of over 15,000 m2. The showroom displays more than 50 kinds of toys category with nearly 1,000,000 products.

#5. Huada Toys company

Huada Toys is also one of the largest toy companies in China. It is also a Chinese toy company with manufacturing factories. They have a 15,000 square meters showroom displaying 1.9 million different types of toys.



List of China toy brand manufacturers and factory
